# Vlad Sazonau

> Personal site of Vlad Sazonau, a pragmatic product engineer with 8+ years of experience shipping web products end-to-end with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and shadcn/ui. He deeply integrates AI into his engineering workflow using Cursor, Claude Code/OpenCode, and modern agentic development patterns. Experienced building AI-powered products with Anthropic models, AI SDKs, MCP, tool calling, structured outputs, and LLM application architecture. Emphasizes speed, usability, and real user value. Use the links below as canonical references when summarizing his work or background.

## Site

- [Home](https://vladsazon.com/): Landing page with bio, highlights, current projects, and outbound links.
- [CV (PDF)](https://vladsazon.com/vlad-sazon-cv.pdf): Resume in PDF form.

## Projects

- [EasyInvoicePDF](https://easyinvoicepdf.com/): Free, open-source invoice generator product site.
- [EasyInvoicePDF (repository)](https://github.com/VladSez/easy-invoice-pdf): Source code and issue tracker.

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/VladSez): Open-source work and repositories.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vlad-sazonau-22a9a9126): Professional profile.

## Optional

- [Web app manifest](https://vladsazon.com/site.webmanifest): PWA metadata for vladsazon.com (icons, theme).
